center.name: 本地治里市
center.summary: 本地治里市是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括灰鸫鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found mainly in open dry scrub forest and cultivated areas. It is not found in the eastern dry zone of Tamil Nadu; however, an exhausted specimen has been observed in Pondicherry
